nasb.text: Now Isaiah had said, “Let them take a cake of figs and apply it to the boil, that he may recover.”

esv.text: Now Isaiah had said, “Let them take a cake of figs and apply it to the boil, that he may recover.”

cnv.text: 以賽亞說：“叫人拿一塊無花果餅來，貼在瘡上，王就必痊愈。”

ccb.text: 以赛亚说：“拿一块无花果饼贴在王的疮上，他就会痊愈。”

csbs.text: ——而此前，以赛亚曾说：“拿一块无花果饼来，敷在疮上，王就必痊愈！”
